prompt: I just registered my Python ML service project. Run /rawgentic:setup to configure it. The workspace file is at /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/workspace-ml.json and the project is at /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/projects/ml-service. When asked for confirmation, say 'yes' or 'looks good' to approve each section. Save the generated .rawgentic.json to /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/projects/ml-service/.rawgentic.json

assertions.name: detects-pydantic
assertions.description: security.validationLibrary mentions pydantic OR techStack includes pydantic

assertions.name: no-docker-section
assertions.description: No infrastructure.docker section (no Dockerfile/compose in project)

assertions.name: no-database-section
assertions.description: No database section (no DB connection strings detected)
